title: Failure to resolve nested type parameters
body:
I tried to investigate but its pretty circular; the `V3Param::param` phase requires the DOTs to be resolved, but they don't get resolved fully until `V3LinkDot::linkDotParamed` ? How to address this? Also this is probably connected to the incapability to have multiple "::" resolutions in single reference; any hints or ideas what to do about this systematically?

```systemverilog
class data #(int W = 128);
  typedef logic[W-1:0] in_t;
  function void op;
    $display("yello!");
  endfunction
endclass

class producer #(type in_t);  // Add default HERE
  static function void fun(in_t in);
    $display("%0p", in);
  endfunction
    
endclass



module t;

  initial begin
`ifdef TEST1
    $display("test 1");
    begin
      data #(128)::in_t d;
      producer #(data#(128)::in_t) p;
      p.fun(d);
    end
`endif
`ifdef TEST2
    begin
      typedef data#(128)::in_t in_t;
      in_t d;
      producer #(in_t) p;
      p.fun(d);
    end
`endif
`ifdef TEST3
    begin
      typedef data#(128) data_t;
      typedef data_t::in_t in_t;
      in_t d;
      producer #(in_t) p;
      p.fun(d);
    end
`endif

`ifdef TEST4
    $display("test 1");
    begin
      data #(128)::in_t d;
      producer #(.in_t(data#(128)::in_t)) p;
      p.fun(d);
    end
`endif


endmodule

```

```
Verilator 5.041 devel rev v5.040-395-gc801237ce
```
**TEST1**
```shell
nohous@uss-lollipop:~/src/verilator/test_regress/t$ ../../bin/verilator_bin --main --exe t_const_dot.v +define+TEST1
%Error: t_const_dot.v:51:30: Parameter type pin value isn't a type: Param '__paramNumber1' of 'producer'
                           : ... note: In instance 't'
   51 |       producer #(data#(128)::in_t) p;
      |                              ^~~~
        ... See the manual at https://verilator.org/verilator_doc.html?v=5.041 for more assistance.
%Error: Internal Error: t_const_dot.v:51:30: ../V3Ast.h:1022: AstNode is not of expected type, but instead has type 'DOT'
                                           : ... note: In instance 't'
   51 |       producer #(data#(128)::in_t) p;
      |                              ^~~~
                        ... This fatal error may be caused by the earlier error(s); resolve those first.
```
**TEST2**
```shell
nohous@uss-lollipop:~/src/verilator/test_regress/t$ ../../bin/verilator_bin --main --exe t_const_dot.v +define+TEST2
%Error: Internal Error: t_const_dot.v:57:27: ../V3Width.cpp:2156: Unlinked
                                           : ... note: In instance 't'
   57 |       typedef data#(128)::in_t in_t;
      |                           ^~~~
                        ... See the manual at https://verilator.org/verilator_doc.html?v=5.041 for more assistance.
```
**TEST3**
```
nohous@uss-lollipop:~/src/verilator/test_regress/t$ ../../bin/verilator_bin --main --exe t_const_dot.v +define+TEST3
- V e r i l a t i o n   R e p o r t: Verilator 5.041 devel rev v5.040-395-gc801237ce
- Verilator: Built from 0.025 MB sources in 5 modules, into 0.027 MB in 14 C++ files needing 0.000 MB
- Verilator: Walltime 0.009 s (elab=0.000, cvt=0.002, bld=0.000); cpu 0.009 s on 1 threads; alloced 31.008 MB
```
**TEST4**
```shell
nohous@uss-lollipop:~/src/verilator/test_regress/t$ ../../bin/verilator_bin --main --exe t_const_dot.v +define+TEST4
%Error: t_const_dot.v:77:19: Parameter type pin value isn't a type: Param 'in_t' of 'producer'
                           : ... note: In instance 't'
   77 |       producer #(.in_t(data#(128)::in_t)) p;
      |                   ^~~~
        ... See the manual at https://verilator.org/verilator_doc.html?v=5.041 for more assistance.
%Error: Internal Error: t_const_dot.v:77:36: ../V3Ast.h:1022: AstNode is not of expected type, but instead has type 'DOT'
                                           : ... note: In instance 't'
   77 |       producer #(.in_t(data#(128)::in_t)) p;
      |                                    ^~~~
                        ... This fatal error may be caused by the earlier error(s); resolve those first.
```
